positive: A stylized, intricate celestial fauna silhouette of a majestic griffin soaring over crescent moons and nebulae. The griffin has sharp, angular wings and a strong central pose. Background elements include geometric celestial patterns, glowing constellations, and deep space voids. Art style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets cosmic abstract. Composition: Highly symmetrical, centered, suitable for chest print. Lighting: Deep contrast, dramatic chiaroscuro with neon-blue and ethereal gold highlights. Color palette: Midnight indigo, deep violet, sapphire blue, and metallic gold. Print-friendly details: Clean lines, high contrast for vinyl cutting, scalable vector aesthetic, no gradients needed, solid silhouette definition.
